hero.title: Argentine Leather. Quality that travels the world.
hero.subtitle: Second-generation family-owned company specialized in exporting bovine, goat, and buffalo hides to international markets.

about_us.title: One family. Three decades in leather.
about_us.content: Rauch Leathers S.A. is led by Rubén De Fabio and Marcos De Fabio, supervising every stage of the process from sourcing to international commercialization.

tag2.title: Quality
tag2.content: Stability and reliability in every shipment.

tag3.title: Traceability
tag3.content: Complete origin tracking throughout the supply chain.
